strategies.name: quick-fix
strategies.description: Fix the specific error. Minimal change.
strategies.prompt_modifier: Fix the specific error shown below. Make the minimal change needed. Do NOT refactor or restructure.

strategies.name: refactor
strategies.description: Previous fix failed. Read more context, refactor the approach.
strategies.prompt_modifier: The previous quick-fix attempts failed. Read more surrounding code for context. Consider a different approach to the same problem. Refactor if needed.

strategies.name: alternative
strategies.description: All previous attempts failed. Try a completely different approach.
strategies.prompt_modifier: All previous approaches have failed. Try a COMPLETELY DIFFERENT approach. Consider alternative libraries, patterns, or workarounds. Think outside the box.

strategies.name: escalate
strategies.description: Prepare a detailed failure report for the user.
strategies.prompt_modifier: All automated fix attempts have failed. Prepare a detailed report: what the error is, what was tried, why each approach failed, and what the user should investigate manually.
